'''Tarrvin-on-Kallik''' was a manufacturing corporation based on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Adumar/Legends|Adumar]] known for its [[Starfighter/Legends|fighter]] productions. The company was best known for producing the [[Blade-28 fighter]] and the [[Blade-32 superiority fighter]].

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]''
